category_sources: Official OpenSSF page says Scorecard auto-generates security scores for open source projects: https://openssf.org/scorecard/
source_facts.description says Security health metrics for Open Source.
display_name_sources: Official OpenSSF page says the project should be referred to as OpenSSF Scorecard or Scorecard: https://openssf.org/scorecard/
docs_sources: Official GitHub README includes Overview, Using Scorecard, Checks, and scoring documentation sections: https://github.com/ossf/scorecard#readme
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/ossf/scorecard; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README documents Scorecard CLI, checks, scoring, and GitHub Action usage: https://github.com/ossf/scorecard#readme
source_facts.description identifies security health metrics for open source.
